'''Vulatan''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Vulatan achieved the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] circa [[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]]. Vulatan studied as a [[Jedi Consular|Consular]], specializing in the field of diplomacy and becoming a well-respected [[Jedi Diplomat|diplomat]]. On a mission assigned by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], Master Vulatan was part of a relief effort to [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] that included fellow Masters [[Gra'aton]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], as well as some fourteen [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]]. Attempting to salvage the wreck of the lost [[Praxeum ship/Legends|praxeum ship]], the ''[[Chu'unthor]]'', the Jedi were met with the [[Witches of Dathomir]], who guard the wreck from the Jedi. After losing fourteen Padawans to the Witches, Yoda was able to negotiate the release of the surviving passengers of the ship and received the guarantee of the Witches to protect the ship's treasures from the violent [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]], a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] worshiping local cult.<ref name="TCP" />
